title: astragalus harbisonii
intro: Astragalus harbisonii, also known as harbison's milkvetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus harbisonii include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune system function, and reduced stress and fatigue levels. Astragalus harbisonii can be prepared into various herbal supplements, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are commonly used to promote overall well-being and prevent illness.
